entity.label: Zaccur
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Father of Shammua, who was one of the spies sent out by Moses (Num. 13:4).

nodes.label: Zaccur
nodes.description: Father of Shammua, who was one of the spies sent out by Moses (Num. 13:4).

nodes.label: Shammua
nodes.description: One of the spies sent out by Moses to search the land (Num. 13:4). He represented the tribe of Reuben.

verses.text: And these were their names: of the tribe of Reuben, Shammua the son of Zaccur.
